prompt: Add user accounts to my app — people should be able to sign up and log in.
Let users sign in with their Google account.
Let my users pay for a monthly subscription.
Charge teams per seat as they add members.
Add teams so users can invite coworkers to a shared workspace.
Add admin and member roles, and only let admins delete things.
Send a welcome email when someone registers.
Receive and verify incoming Stripe webhooks.
Protect the login endpoint from brute-force attempts.
Add team billing: teams, per-seat subscription pricing, and role-based access.
